title: Unofficial ULTRAKILL Modpack
description: This Modpack tries to replicate the game: ULTRAKILL by Arsi "Hakita" Patala. It recreates its Weapons, Enemies and even Mechanics like parrying and movement tech, {STILL IN DEV, THIS IS A DEMO VERSION ONLY}
body:
This mod depicts overexaggerated, cartoony pixel blood and violence; if that's too mature for you, don't play it.

 **MANKIND IS (DEAD)**
**BLOOD IS (FUEL)**
**HELL IS FULL**

ULTRACRAFT

Mankind is Dead. Blood is Fuel. Hell is Full.

This Mod is a Tribute to the Game ULTRAKILL by Arsi "Hakita" Patala.

Contents

``UltraHUD
Blood (and a lot of it too!)
All Prologue and Limbo Enemies
13 Weapons (Revolver Variants, Shotgun Variants & Machine Sword, Attractor Nailgun, Flamethrower, Soap, and an original one)
Parry and offhand Punch Mechanic
Ultrakill movement tech (enter High Velocity mode pressing V) (even including things like Wall-Jumps, Alternate Underwater Physics and Slam Storage)
A bunch of Blocks and Items
Lots of Gamerules for Server/World configuration
Intro sequence and Custom Main Menu Backgrounds (toggleable)
Customizable Wings
Almost too Customizable Terminals``

V2.0.0 Release Trailer from the mod-creator:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jpuiTifUs0Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The mod is fully Server compatible; for serverside config stuff gamerules are used. (they all start with an "ultra-" prefix to make them easier to find)

Some Items have hidden lore. This is usually Jokes or dev Comments. To see it, press F3+H to enable advanced tooltips.

**credits to mod-creator:Absolutelyaya on Youtube.com**
